candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue/sales line; preferred over total/subtotal labels.

Non-core operating income, not total revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit revenue line, not the total-style operating income row.

candidates.why: Direct merchandise/service acquisition cost and best match for cost of sales.
Operating overhead/personnel expense, not COGS here.

variables.notes: Goods for resale is the clearest direct cost line.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row. Chose overhead component rows and excluded subtotal-like 'External Expenses'. Excluded depreciation/amortization and COGS.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest, so not selected to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest components and excluded broader financial expense totals/duplicates.

candidates.why: This appears to exclude non-controlling interest, as 'Total Equity' is higher and roughly equals Total equity plus NCI.
Appears to include non-controlling interest, so not preferred for BE under the BE+MIB rule.

variables.notes: Selected 'Total equity' because it appears to represent parent/common equity excluding non-controlling interest.
